title: 1 · The Site
blurb: Mission briefing: start NW, reach the centre POI and return — across borderline slopes, deep shadow, and a radio-shadow floor.

title: 2 · Follow the ДЗЗ Route
blurb: Receive the remote-sensing team's route, sanity-check it against your rover, and fly it to the POI and back.

title: 3 · Radio-Shadow & Autonomy
blurb: The floor drops the link to Earth — hand the rover a plan and let it run autonomously until it climbs back into line of sight.

title: 4 · The Scored Run
blurb: The graded traverse: reach the POI and return, fast and upright, for points. Re-run on a harder rover for the next tier.
